name: Orange Flower Almond Cookies
recipeInstructions:
DESCRIPTION: Delicately flavored orange cookie cups topped with an orange, almond-paste filling.
Preheat oven to 350°F. Combine flour, baking powder, and cinnamon; set aside. Beat together butter, sugar, and orange flower water until light and fluffy. Stir in flour in half-cup increments, blending after each addition. Form the dough into a ball, wrap in plastic, and refrigerate for 20 minutes. Beat almond paste, butter, sugar, cinnamon, and orange flower water until smooth. Roll small teaspoonfuls of paste into smooth balls; set aside. Roll heaping tablespoons of dough into one-inch balls. Arrange them one inch apart on buttered baking sheets. Use a thumb to make a half-inch-deep indentation in each dough ball, fill indentations with almond paste balls. Bake 15-18 minutes or until bottoms are golden and almond paste is lightly browned. Sprinkle hot cookies with granulated sugar. Cool on racks. Store airtight at room temperature for up to one week, or freeze for three months.
